detail: GWAS Catalog association with p=1e-29. Effect: OR/Beta=0.025255688 [0.021-0.03] unit increase. Initial sample: 408,112 British individuals. Replication sample: NA.
whyItMatters: This common-variant association is matched locally against the uploaded genotype and should be treated as a tendency signal, not a prediction.
riskSummary: VEGFA - LINC02537 risk allele is associated with Reticulocyte count (OR/Beta 0.025255688 [0.021-0.03] unit increase) in a large, replicated genome-wide study
notes: Generated from bulk GWAS Catalog data; effect size and ancestry transferability require review.

title: White blood cell count association near VEGFA - LINC02537

riskSummary: VEGFA - LINC02537 risk allele is associated with White blood cell count (OR/Beta 0.015791 [0.012-0.02] SD unit increase) in a large, replicated genome-wide study
